rules.rule_text:
title: POST requests from abnormal User-Agent
id: b306ab64-7d04-41cd-94f2-91c2b3c93fe2
description: POST request observed from unexpected user-agents utilized by malware
references:
- https://www.malware-traffic-analysis.net/2022/06/17/index.html
- https://threatresearch.ext.hp.com/svcready-a-new-loader-reveals-itself/
- https://asec.ahnlab.com/en/59387/
status: stable
author: NTT Security - Axel Olsson
date: '2022-08-17'
updated: '2023-11-30'
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection1:
    cs-method: POST
  selection2:
  - c-useragent|contains:
    - MSOFFICE
  - c-useragent|startswith:
    - svc/
  - c-useragent:
    - Mozilla/4.0 (compatible; MSIE 7.0; Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; Trident/7.0;
      .NET4.0C; .NET4.0E)
  filter:
  - url|contains:
    - autodiscover
  - cs-host:
    - crashdiag.solidworks.com
  condition: selection1 and selection2 and not filter
falsepositives:
- Legitimate POST traffic
level: medium
tags:
- attack.command_and_control
